name: Sand Guard Bow
description: The deserts of Ahjat are harsh, fickle, and teeming with dangers. Fortunately, the Sand Guard, tasked with escorting caravans, knows exactly how to handle them - whether it's raiding nomadic bands or something even worse...
descriptionZh: 艾哈雅特沙漠变幻莫测，危机四伏。幸而有沙野卫兵护送商队，应对沿途出没的游牧劫匪或者更骇人的威胁。
